claims.claim: Across 10 seeds of 100 queries each (10 distractors per query, 70% conflict rate), the naive latest-mention baseline achieved a mean exact accuracy of 10.1% (SD 2.2%) and a mean unsupported-answer rate of 97.5% (SD 1.4%), while the trusted distiller achieved 100% exact and citation accuracy with zero unsupported answers.
